## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Area

- [ ] Extraction flow
- [ ] Browser automation notes
- [ ] Transcript cleanup
- [ ] API behavior notes
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Safety or privacy guidance

## Test or review notes

- Public example used:
- Browser or environment:
- What changed in the extracted transcript:

## Checklist

- [ ] No cookies, tokens, account data, private profiles, or watch history are included.
- [ ] No downloaded video files are included.
- [ ] Example content is public and appropriate to share.
- [ ] The change does not bypass access controls.
- [ ] AI-assisted drafts were reviewed by a human.
